title: pgstat — Instance Detail
description: Tek instance icin 360 derece gorunum. Kritik metriklerde bugun/dun/gecen hafta/gecen ay overlay'leri. Top 20 sorgu/tablo tablolarinda drill-down link.

list.name: instance
list.query: select display_name as __text, instance_pk as __value from control.instance_inventory where is_active order by display_name
list.label: Instance

targets.rawSql: select coalesce(sum(numbackends), 0) as value from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance)
select count(*) as value from ops.alert where instance_pk = $instance and status = 'open'

select round((100.0 * sum(blks_hit_delta) / nullif(sum(blks_hit_delta + blks_read_delta), 0))::numeric, 2) as value from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts > now() - interval '1 hour'

select round((sum(xact_commit_delta + xact_rollback_delta) / nullif(extract(epoch from (max(sample_ts) - min(sample_ts))), 0))::numeric, 1) as value from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts > now() - interval '1 hour'
select coalesce(sum(period_wal_size_byte), 0) as value from fact.pg_wal_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts > now() - interval '24 hours'
select coalesce(sum(blks_read_delta) * 8192, 0) as value from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)

panels.title: Bağlantı Sayısı — bugün vs dün vs geçen hafta vs geçen ay
panels.description: Trend karşılaştırması: 4 zaman dilimi üst üste. Aynı saat aralığındaki değerler.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, max(numbackends) as "Bugün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '1 day', $interval) as time, max(numbackends) as "Dün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '7 days', $interval) as time, max(numbackends) as "Geçen hafta" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '30 days', $interval) as time, max(numbackends) as "Geçen ay" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' group by 1 order by 1

panels.title: WAL Üretimi (bayt/sn) — bugün vs dün vs geçen hafta vs geçen ay
panels.description: Otomatik birim: B/s, KB/s, MB/s, GB/s. Click+drag ile zoom. DB idle ise 0 normal — yazma operasyonu (insert/update/delete) gerek.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, sum(period_wal_size_byte)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "Bugün" from fact.pg_wal_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '1 day', $interval) as time, sum(period_wal_size_byte)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "Dün" from fact.pg_wal_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '7 days', $interval) as time, sum(period_wal_size_byte)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "Geçen hafta" from fact.pg_wal_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '30 days', $interval) as time, sum(period_wal_size_byte)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "Geçen ay" from fact.pg_wal_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' group by 1 order by 1

panels.title: WAL Üretimi (bucket toplamı) — küçük değerleri okumak için
panels.description: Bucket içindeki toplam WAL bytes. Bayt/sn'den daha okunabilir küçük değerlerde.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, coalesce(sum(period_wal_size_byte), 0) as "WAL bytes" from fact.pg_wal_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

panels.title: Sorgu Tipi Breakdown — commit / rollback / insert / update / delete / select
panels.description: Saniye basina commit, rollback, insert/update/delete tuple, ve select (tup_returned) sayilari. Yuk profilini cikarir.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, sum(xact_commit_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as commit, sum(xact_rollback_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as rollback, sum(tup_inserted_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as insert, sum(tup_updated_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as update, sum(tup_deleted_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as delete, sum(tup_returned_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "select (tup_returned)" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

panels.title: TPS toplam (commit + rollback) — bugün vs dün vs geçen hafta vs geçen ay
panels.description: Bucket'taki delta toplamı, bucket boyutuna bölünerek saniye başına oran.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, sum(xact_commit_delta + xact_rollback_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "Bugün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '1 day', $interval) as time, sum(xact_commit_delta + xact_rollback_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "Dün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '7 days', $interval) as time, sum(xact_commit_delta + xact_rollback_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "Geçen hafta" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '30 days', $interval) as time, sum(xact_commit_delta + xact_rollback_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "Geçen ay" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' group by 1 order by 1

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio — bugün vs dün vs geçen hafta vs geçen ay

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, 100.0 * sum(blks_hit_delta) / nullif(sum(blks_hit_delta + blks_read_delta), 0) as "Bugün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '1 day', $interval) as time, 100.0 * sum(blks_hit_delta) / nullif(sum(blks_hit_delta + blks_read_delta), 0) as "Dün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '7 days', $interval) as time, 100.0 * sum(blks_hit_delta) / nullif(sum(blks_hit_delta + blks_read_delta), 0) as "Geçen hafta" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '30 days', $interval) as time, 100.0 * sum(blks_hit_delta) / nullif(sum(blks_hit_delta + blks_read_delta), 0) as "Geçen ay" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' group by 1 order by 1

panels.title: Disk Read (bayt/sn) — bugün vs dün vs geçen hafta vs geçen ay

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, sum(blks_read_delta * 8192)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "Bugün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '1 day', $interval) as time, sum(blks_read_delta * 8192)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "Dün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '7 days', $interval) as time, sum(blks_read_delta * 8192)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "Geçen hafta" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '30 days', $interval) as time, sum(blks_read_delta * 8192)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) as "Geçen ay" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(snapshot_ts, $interval) as time, state as metric, count(*)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$interval'::interval), 0) * 60 as value from fact.pg_activity_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(snapshot_ts) and state is not null group by 1, state order by 1

select $__timeGroup(snapshot_ts, $interval) as time, wait_event_type as metric, count(*) as value from fact.pg_activity_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(snapshot_ts) and wait_event_type is not null group by 1, wait_event_type order by 1

panels.title: Top 20 Sorgu — toplam exec süresi (tıkla → drill-down)

targets.rawSql: select ss.queryid, left(coalesce(qt.query_text, '?'), 200) as query, dbr.datname as db, rr.rolname as "user", sum(d.calls_delta) as calls, round(sum(d.total_exec_time_ms_delta)::numeric, 0) as total_ms, round((sum(d.total_exec_time_ms_delta)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.calls_delta), 0))::numeric, 2) as mean_ms, sum(d.rows_delta) as rows, sum(d.shared_blks_read_delta) * 8192 as disk_read, sum(d.wal_bytes_delta) as wal_bytes from fact.pgss_delta d join dim.statement_series ss on ss.statement_series_id = d.statement_series_id left join dim.query_text qt on qt.query_text_id = ss.query_text_id left join dim.database_ref dbr on dbr.instance_pk = ss.instance_pk and dbr.dbid = ss.dbid left join dim.role_ref rr on rr.instance_pk = ss.instance_pk and rr.userid = ss.userid where d.instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) group by ss.queryid, qt.query_text, dbr.datname, rr.rolname order by total_ms desc nulls last limit 20

select t.schemaname || '.' || t.relname as relation, t.n_live_tup_estimate as live, t.n_dead_tup_estimate as dead, round(100.0 * t.n_dead_tup_estimate / nullif(t.n_live_tup_estimate + t.n_dead_tup_estimate, 0), 1) as dead_pct from fact.pg_table_stat_delta t where t.instance_pk = $instance and t.sample_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance) and t.n_dead_tup_estimate > 1000 order by dead_pct desc nulls last limit 20

select alert_id, severity, alert_code, status, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, acknowledged_at, occurrence_count, left(title, 100) as title, left(message, 200) as message from ops.alert where instance_pk = $instance and status = 'open' order by severity, first_seen_at desc limit 50
